name: grok
description: Use Grok as a coding assistant from Claude Code: review, reason, implement, and verify through a hardened sandboxed wrapper. Not affiliated with xAI.

runMode.title: Run mode

notificationMode.title: Completion notifications
notificationMode.description: off, auto (background runs only), native, or webhook
